info.title: Suitest Network API methods
info.description: If you are viewing this on SwaggerHub, be sure to also check the Suitest Network API docs on [Suitest website](https://suite.st/docs/suitest-network-api/).

tags.name: App configurations
tags.description: Configurations are ways for running your app in a different environment.

tags.name: Test packs
tags.description: Test packs are a way to execute many tests on many devices in one test run.

tags.name: Test runs / Test results
tags.description: Get results from different test runs.

tags.name: Appium server
tags.description: Use appium server to run your tests.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
Setup basic webhooks.
If you can not use webhooks due to infrastructure limitation you can use [Notifications](/docs/suitest-network-api/notifications) as alternative.

appId.description: Suitest app ID. Can be found on the "Settings" page of your app.

testPackRunId.description: Test pack run ID represents one launch of test pack. With this ID all started tests can be aborted or results can be fetched.

resultId.description: Test result ID represents launch of a single test on a single device.

get.summary: Get a list of Suitest apps
get.description:
Returns an array of all Suitest apps belonging to this organization or personal account.
Response contains app metadata as well as all defined app configurations and tags.

200.description: Success. List of Suitest apps returned in body.

get.description: Returns all configurations defined for an app identified by `appId` and `versionId`.

200.description: Success. List of app's configurations returned in body.

platform.description: platform for which the configuration is designed.

get.description: Returns details of an app configuration defined by `configId`.

200.description: Success. App configuration details returned in body.

404.description: The app configuration does not exist.

parameters.name: x-suitest-instrument
parameters.description: If set to "auto", package will be auto-instrumented. Valid values are "auto" and "manual".

parameters.name: x-suitest-html-package
parameters.description: Specifies that application uses html "webview". Valid values are "true" and "false".

parameters.name: x-suitest-filename
parameters.description: Filename of the uploaded data. Expecting string with extension.

parameters.name: request body
parameters.description: Package content, raw data without any encoding

200.description: Package was uploaded for processing. Returns poll url to check on the processing progress.

404.description: Application or configuration was not found or current configuration does not support.

424.description: Invalid format of package or app configuration does not support package.

200.description:
Response from the poll url will be 'pending', 'done' once the package is uploaded or 'error' if processing issue occurred.
> Note: On finished processing the poll url will return value only once and then becomes invalid (404).

404.description: Processing with this id does not exist.

get.description:
The exact link of a video is provided by a JavaScript API call or by /results/{resultId} feed. For download of the video you can either repeatedly call this feed or use webhooks. We recommend usage of webhooks if possible for your setup. We suggest to call delete feed after successful download.
This feed will be available even if webhooks are used (e.g. for situation when for some reason webhook service could not receive our messages).

202.description:
Recording is not yet ready.
This status code is returned when video is still recorded or uploaded. Please wait at least 60s before trying it again or use webhooks to avoid polling.

location.description: Location from which recording can be downloaded. It has short validity and does not require any authorization. If its response is 410 please obtain another link.

404.description: Video is not available. Either the link is invalid or the video was already deleted from our storage. Please do not call this feed again.

delete.description: The purpose of this feed is to make room for new recordings. In case a video is already downloaded from our storage, you can call this feed to free the space and allow recording more videos. Especially useful when policy is set to "do not create new media files". But can be also useful for policy "delete oldest media files" because in that case it helps to prevent situation that Suitest will delete recordings which was not yet downloaded.

200.description: video was deleted

get.summary: Get list of finished tests grouped by test pack run
get.description: Returns finished test pack executions. Please note that if there are no results, nothing is returned.

200.description: Success. Array of test scenarios returned in body.

get.summary: Get detailed test result for all lines

200.description: Success. Test is finished.

recordingId.description: Absent when recording does not exist.

recordingUrl.description: Absent when recording does not exist.

tapResult.description: results in format of Test Anything Protocol version 12 https://testanything.org/tap-specification.html

get.summary: Get list of finished tests grouped by test pack run
get.description: Returns finished test pack executions belonging to an app version identified by `appId` and `versionId`. Please note that if there are no results, nothing is returned.

200.description: Success. Array of test scenarios returned in body.

404.description: Returned when there is no app matching `appId` or `versionId` in this organization.

get.description: Returns all test scenarios belonging to an app identified by `appId` and `versionId`.

200.description: Success. Array of test scenarios returned in body.

404.description: Returned when there is no app matching `appId` in this organization.

get.description: Returns test scenario definition identified by `testId`.

200.description: Success. Test scenario returned in body.

404.description: Returned when there is no app matching `testId` in this organization.

get.summary: Get a list of all test packs
get.description: Returns all test packs defined for an app identified by `appId` and `versionId`.

200.description: Success. List of test packs returned in response body.
Test pack details.

post.summary: Starts execution of a test pack
post.description: Start execution of the test pack identified by `testPackId`. In the request body you can additionally submit `config` - an object overriding parts of the app configuration specified for this test pack.

location.description: location where test results can be found.

get.summary: Get list of finished tests grouped by test pack run
get.description: Returns finished test pack executions belonging to the test pack specified by `testPackId`. Please note that if there are no results, nothing is returned.

200.description: Success. Array of test scenarios returned in body.

404.description: Returned when there is no test pack matching `testPackId` in this organization.

get.summary: Get results for test pack round executions/iterations.
get.description: Returns results for test pack round executions/iterations.

parameters.name: round
parameters.description: Round of the Test Pack execution.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
Limit the result set to the specified number of items.
If omitted 10 results will be returned.
max value is 10, min value is 1

200.description: Results of round executions/iterations of a test pack.

next.description: Link to the next page if it exists. The last page of a collection does not have this value. Use this link to navigate the result set and refrain from constructing your own URLs.

iteration.description: Number of the iteration that was created due to running/rerunning a test pack.

source.description: Number of the iteration that this test pack run is based on (null if launching a test pack without using the rerun option).

created.description: when the test pack run was launched

testPackRunId.description: ID of test pack run. Can be used to repeat an iteration.

executionStatus.description: Status of the test pack run. `planned` means some test is scheduled to execution. `manualLaunch` means that no test is running and some test requires user action to start. `running` means some test is running. `finished` means all tests are finished.

overallResult.description: Result of the test pack run if it was finished. Omitted if not finished or no result is present.

get.summary: Get results for test pack execution
get.description: Returns all results for a test pack execution.

200.description: Overall result for one execution of test pack.

testPackId.description: ID of the test pack which has been used for the execution.

round.description: Sequence number of execution of this test pack. Each organization has own sequence numbers. Numbered from 1.

iteration.description: Number of the iteration that was created due to running/rerunning a test pack.

source.description: Number of the iteration that this test pack run is based on (null if launching a test pack without using the rerun option).

initiatedBy.description: Contains info who initiated the test pack run. In case of scheduled execution as the initiator is reported the user who saved test pack last.

name.description: user name, set only when `type` is `user`

email.description: user email, set only when `type` is `user`

includeChangelist.description: `true` if test pack execution has been executed with not stored changes. Please consult [Application versions overview](https://suite.st/docs/versions/) for more information.

effectiveAppConfig.description: Effective app configuration used for tests with applied overrides from API.

executionStatus.description: Status of the test pack run. `planned` means some test is scheduled to execution and no test is running. `manualLaunch` means that no test is running and some test requires user action to start. `running` means some test is running. `finished` means all tests are finished.

overallResult.description: Result of the test if it was finished. Omitted if not finished or no result is present.

executionStatus.description: Status of the test execution by test run. `planned` means some test is scheduled to execution and no test is running. `manualLaunch` means that no test is running and some test requires user action to start. `running` means some test is running. `finished` means all tests are finished.

overallResult.description: Result of the test if it was finished. Omitted if not finished.

success.description: number of devices which finished with success

warning.description: number of devices which finished with warning

failure.description: number of devices which finished with failure

fatal.description: number of devices which finished with fatal failure

exit.description: number of devices which finished with exit result

aborted.description: number of devices which finished with aborted result

running.description: number of devices which are executing this test

firmware.description: Version of device firmware which was valid when test was executed.

executionStatus.description: Status of the test execution by device. `planned` means some test is scheduled to execution and no test is running. `manualLaunch` means that no test is running and some test requires user action to start. `running` means some test is running. `finished` means all tests are finished.

overallResult.description: Result of the test if it was finished. Omitted if not finished.

success.description: number of successful tests executed on the device

warning.description: number of tests with result warning executed on the device

failure.description: number of failed tests executed on the device

fatal.description: number of fatally failed tests executed on the device

exit.description: number of tests with result exit executed on the device

aborted.description: number of tests which result aborted on the device

running.description: number of tests which are running on the device

list.description: Contains result for each device. It is present only for detailed result request.

startTime.description: Time when the test was started.

endTime.description: Time when the test was finished.

post.summary: Abort all running tests in the execution round associated with a test pack

200.description: Tests have been aborted.

404.description: The test pack run does not exist.

post.summary: Repeat execution/iteration of a test pack run

parameters.name: testPackRunId
parameters.description: ID of the Test Pack Run or iteration.

location.description: location where test results can be found.

424.description:
**Many different errors.**
**Detailed description for specific errors:**
 * **deletedDevicesOrTests:** *Occurs when trying to rerun tests that were deleted or rerun tests on devices that were deleted.
 You could either rerun the iteration with a different strategy as long as it does not include any deleted tests or devices, or launch the test pack again so a new round is created.*

get.description:
Get a list of devices in an organization identified by the specified token.
List includes both own and shared devices.

200.description: Success.

get.description:
Get a list of platforms in an organization identified by the specified token.
The list is based on company and shared devices. It includes both default and custom platforms.

200.description: Success.
Success.

inactivityTimeout.description: Number of minutes of inactivity after which device will be turned off. `0` means never.

customName.example: TV in the top right corner
customName.description: Field configurable by the device owner

location.description: Field configurable by the device owner. Empty string means removal of the field.

team.description: Field configurable by the device owner. Empty string means removal of the field.

responsibleUser.description: Field configurable by the device owner. Empty string means removal of the field.

osInfo.description: Field configurable by the device owner. Empty string means removal of the field.

otherInfo.description: Field configurable by the device owner. Empty string means removal of the field.

200.description: Success.

force.description: Effective only together with action disable. When force is set to true device will be disabled even if it is actively used.

200.description: Success.

424.description: The device is currently busy (e.g. by running test). Either wait for the device to become available or use force parameter to disable the device regardless of current activity.

post.summary: Switch power for a smart plug

action.description: Expected final state of the smart plug. The `power-cycle` will switch off the smart plug, wait 3s and switch it on.

424.description: Device is not a smart plug or can not be controlled (e.g. disconnected from the network, disabled)

post.description: Change an assigned camera for a device. In case of the camera is recording a test the change will be refused unless `force` parameter is used. A camera which is streaming can be assigned/unassigned without `force` parameter.

cameraId.description: camera id or `null` in case of unsetting camera

force.description: if `true` camera is changed even there is active recording of test.

200.description: Success.

424.description: Camera is currently recording. To change it use `force` parameter or wait till the recording is finished.

get.description: Get a list of control units in an organization.

200.description: Success.

name.description: Custom name given to the control unit

online.description: Reports online status of control unit. If you need monitor status of control unit consider usage of [Notifications](/docs/suitest-network-api/notifications) to get updates in realtime instead of polling this feed.

reboot.description: Defined only for Raspberry Pi/CandyBox/WingBox control units. When `reboot` flag is *true*, restart of a control unit is requested. `online` flag does not reliably say that a control unit can be used. The control unit can be reliably used only when `online` is true and `reboot` is *false*.

shutdown.description: Defined only for Raspberry Pi/CandyBox/WingBox control units. When `shutdown` flag is *true*, shutdown of a control unit is requested. `online` flag does not reliably say that the control unit can be used. The control unit can be reliably used only when `online` is *true* and `shutdown` is *false*. The control unit is considered as fully shut down only when `shutdown` flag is set to *false*.

osName.description: Operation system of the control unit. Only SuitestDrive provides this information.

osVersion.description: Version of operation system of the control unit. Only SuitestDrive provides this information.

type.description: Possible values are candybox, drive (for SuitestDrive), personal-pi (for Raspberry Pi), solo-candy.

post.summary: Power off a WingBox / Raspberry Pi / CandyBox
post.description: Action designed for reliable shutdown of a control unit. In case of maintenance of control unit, e.g. when unplugging from the power is needed, we strongly recommend to shutdown the control unit before any action. Shutting down ensures that internal storage will not be damaged by unexpected power outage.

200.description: The control unit has been successfully shut down. It can be safely unplugged from the power.

403.description: Forbidden access - your IP address is not whitelisted or not enough access rights to perform this operation. Please contact your Suitest administrator for more information.

404.description: The control unit does not exists.

422.description: Wrong control unit has been selected - power off not possible.

424.description: Power off can not be performed.

errorType.description:
Possible errors:
  - `controllerNotConnected` - The control unit is not online
  - `maintenanceInProgress` - we are doing maintenance, please do not power off the control unit, try again later or contact support if problem persists

504.description: The shutdown took more time than expected. The shutdown state is unclear. For check please use `/control-units` feed or check user interface.

post.description: This command will trigger full restart of the control unit, including hosted SuitestDrive.

200.description: The reboot has been initiated.

403.description: Forbidden access - your IP address is not whitelisted or not enough access rights to perform this operation. Please contact your Suitest administrator for more information.

404.description: The control unit does not exists.

422.description: Wrong control unit has been selected - reboot not possible.

errorType.description:
Possible errors:
  - `controllerNotConnected` - The control unit is not online
  - `maintenanceInProgress` - we are doing maintenance, please do not reboot the control unit, try again later or contact support if problem persists

post.summary: Restart a SuitestDrive hosted on a WingBox / Raspberry Pi / CandyBox.

200.description: The restart has been initiated.

403.description: Forbidden access - your IP address is not whitelisted or not enough access rights to perform this operation. Please contact your Suitest administrator for more information.

404.description: The control unit does not exists.

422.description: Wrong control unit has been selected - restart not possible.

424.description: The Raspberry Pi is not online, restart can not be performed.

get.summary: Get list of test runs for test definition
get.description: Retrieves the list of all test runs for a specific test.

200.description: Success.

404.description: The test case was not found within the specified organization.

post.description:
The server should attempt to create a session that most closely matches the desired and required capabilities.

JSONWP Spec Required capabilities have higher priority than desired capabilities and must be set for the session to be created W3C Spec capabilities.alwaysMatch must be set for session to be created; capabilities.firstMatch must match at least one (the first one to match will be used)

Please do not forget to call delete command at the end of the session so that Appium could cleanup the downstream resources properly. Refusing to do so could corrupt the following session creation attempts or to break the stability of your tests in general.

    Security note - new appium server instance is created for each session.

Appium commands can be sent to `/wd/hub/session/{sessionsId}` and they will be proxied to Appium server instance with Suitest driver installed.
Full list of possible error reponses are defined by webdriver protocol https://www.w3.org/TR/webdriver/#dfn-error-code.

200.description: Returns an object describing the session's capabilities (object)

401.description: Authentication failed. Check capabilities suitest:tokenId and suitest:tokenPassword.

403.description: Forbidden access - your IP address is not whitelisted. Please contact your Suitest administrator for more information.

get.description:
Returns information about whether a remote end is in a state in which it can create new sessions and can additionally include arbitrary meta information that is specific to the implementation.

The readiness state is represented by the ready property of the body, which is false if an attempt to create a session at the current time would fail. However, the value true does not guarantee that a New Session command will succeed.

Implementations may optionally include additional meta information as part of the body, but the top-level properties ready and message are reserved and must not be overwritten.

200.description: Returns an object describing the session's capabilities (object)

ready.description: describes readiness state to create a new session

message.description: describes more in detail why session can't be created

get.description: Return all existing webhooks for a company

200.description: Success. List of webhooks returned in body.

post.description:
Create new webhook. Either `appVersionId` or `testPackId` must be provided. This defines a scope of the trigger. When webhook is triggered following data are sent to the provided URL using POST method, with `application/json` content type:

**For failed test pack**:

    {
      type: 'firstTestFailed',
      integrationId: uuid,
      testPack: {
        testPackId: number,
        testPackRunId: string,
        testPackName: string,
        appId: string,
        appName: string,
        versionId: string,
        versionName: string,
        round: number,
      },
      failedTest: {
        definitionId: string,
        definitionName: string,
        appStartTime: string,
        failed: number,
        fatal: number,
        deviceName: string,
        modelId: string,
        firmware: string,
        testRunId: string,
      }
    }

**For finished test pack**:

    {
      type: 'testPackFinished',
      integrationId: uuid,
      testPack: {
        testPackId: number,
        testPackRunId: string,
        testPackName: string,
        appId: string,
        appName: string,
        versionId: string,
        versionName: string,
        round: number,
      },
      overallResult: 'aborted'|'exit'|'failure'|'fatal'|'success'|'warning',
    }

**For recording upload finished**:

    {
      type: 'testPackRecordingUploadFinished',
      integrationId: uuid,
      testPack: {
        testPackId: number,
        testPackRunId: string,
        testPackName: string,
        appId: string,
        appName: string,
        versionId: string,
        versionName: string,
        round: number,
      },
    }

Use test message to get example data.

200.description: Success. The webhook was created.

409.description: A webhook with the same filter settings already exists.

post.description: Send test message for the specified webhook. This feed is solely for development and debugging purpose when integrating webhooks to your CI. Mock data will be sent.

get.summary: Get list of video capture devices
get.description:
The exact link of a video is provided by a JavaScript API call or by /results/{resultId} feed. For download of the video you can either repeatedly call this feed or use webhooks. We recommend usage of webhooks if possible for your setup. We suggest to call delete feed after successful download.
This feed will be available even if webhooks are used (e.g. for situation when for some reason webhook service could not receive our messages).

200.description: List of video capture devices.

created.description: when the test pack run was launched

initiatedBy.description: Contains info who initiated the test pack run. In case of scheduled execution as the initiator is reported the user who saved test pack last.

name.description: user name, set only when `type` is `user`

email.description: user email, set only when `type` is `user`

round.description: Sequence number of execution of this test pack. Each organization has own sequence numbers. Numbered from 1.

iteration.description: Number of the iteration that was created due to running/rerunning a test pack.

numberOfResults.description: Number of all results for this run. If execution status is not finished this number is not final and can grow.

duration.description: number of seconds which all tests was running (does not contain running and planned tests)

executionStatus.description: Status of the test pack run. `planned` means some test is scheduled to execution and no test is running. `running` means some test is running. `finished` means all tests are finished.

overallResult.description: Result of the test if it was finished. Omitted if no test is finished.

versions.description: List of versions of this application.

access.description: own - version is yours, read version is shared with you for read access, your changes are visible only for you and you can not modify data in the source organization, write - you have write access, your changes are visible in the changelist of source organization and also visible for all other parties which have write access but not for parties with read access

clean.description: if false it means that this version has changelist

isDefault.description: if true it means that this version is used automatically for deprecated feeds which does not support versions.

platform.description: Platform for which the configuration is designed

url.description: Optional - only for app configurations without packages or specific application identifiers. Application URL, must start with `http://` or `https://`.

appleAppId.description: Optional - only for Apple platforms. Application Bundle ID.

skyAppId.description: Optional - only for Sky platform. Application ID.

vidaaAppId.description: Optional - only for VIDAA platform. Application ID.

vizioConfigType.description: Optional - only for Vizio. The type of Vizio application definition. URL = using the URL to launch the app from, APP = using the application ID and namespace tolaunch the app.

vizioMessage.description: Optional - only for Vizio. Usually a URL of the application, in specific cases can be also non-URL string.

vizioAppId.description: Optional - only for Vizio, when `vizioConfigType = app`. Application ID.

vizioNamespace.description: Optional - only for Vizio, when `vizioConfigType = app`. Application namespace number.

xfinityAppId.description: Optional - only for Xfinity platform. Application ID.

xumoAppId.description: Optional - only for Xumo platform. Application ID.

appPackage.description: Optional - only if app configuration contains application package. Contains application package properties.

uploadDate.description: Date and time of the application package upload.

autoinstrument.description: If automated Instrumentation library injection is enabled.

htmlPackage.description: Only for Android and Xbox. If package is Native, the value = false. If package is WebView, the value = true.

domainList.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. List of domains applied by Suitestify.

learnDomains.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. If Suitest should try to find domains not listed inside the `domainList` / `notDomains`. The list of domain candidates inside the app configuration will be extended with these new domains.

domainCandidates.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. A list of domains found by Suitestify which may be needed to be present in domainList for Suitestify to work correctly.

notDomains.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. A blacklist of domains for domain autodetection.

proxy.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. A URL of a proxy server through which the application traffic should be routed when using Suitestify.

mapRules.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. Rules that alter behaviour of network requests.

active.description: Marks if the rule is active. Inactive rule is in the list but has no effect on the code.

codeOverrides.description: Optional - only if Suitestify is enabled. Replace strings used in the keys to strings used in the values.

items.description: Definition of a single configuration variable.

key.description: Name of a variable. Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

overrideOpenApp.description: ID of a test which will be used for replacing openApp (UUID).

launchActivity.description: Optional - only for Android. A name of an activity that will be used to start the application.

composeJetpack.description: Optional - only for Android Native applications when using Instrumentation library. If Jetpack compose / Accessibility service should be enabled.

disableConsoleLogs.description: Optional - only for Android. If console logs capturing should be disabled.

deviceOrientation.description: Optional - only for mobile platforms. Device orientation to set when launching the application.

shouldWaitForQuiescence.description: Optional - only for Apple TV simulators and iOS/iPadOS devices. If Suitest should wait for application quiescence before it marks the aoplication as opened.

platform.description: Platform for which the configuration is designed

url.description: Application URL, must start with `http://` or `https://`.

appleAppId.description: Only for Apple platforms. Application Bundle ID.

skyAppId.description: Only for Sky platform. Application ID.

vidaaAppId.description: Only for VIDAA platform. Application ID.

vizioConfigType.description: Type of Vizio application definition. URL = using the URL to launch the app from, APP = using the application ID and namespace tolaunch the app.

vizioAppId.description: Only for Vizio, when `vizioConfigType = app`. Application ID.

vizioMessage.description: Only for Vizio. Usually a URL of the application. In specific cases can be also non-URL string.

vizioNamespace.description: Only for Vizio, when `vizioConfigType = app`. Application namespace number.

autoinstrument.description: If automated Instrumentation library injection is enabled.

htmlPackage.description: Only for Android. If package is Native, the value = false. If package is WebView, the value = true.

suitestify.description: If the Suitestify should be enabled.

domainList.description: List of domains applied by Suitestify.

learnDomains.description: If Suitest should try to find domains not listed inside the `domainList` / `notDomains`. The list of domain candidates inside the app configuration will be extended with these new domains.

domainCandidates.description: A list of domains found by Suitestify which may be needed to be present in domainList for Suitestify to work correctly.

notDomains.description: A blacklist of domains for domain autodetection.

proxy.description: A URL of a proxy server through which the application traffic should be routed when using Suitestify.

mapRules.description: Rules that alter behaviour of network requests.

active.description: Marks if the rule is active. Inactive rule is in the list but has no effect on the code.

codeOverrides.description: Replace strings used in the keys to strings used in the values.

items.description: Definition of a single configuration variable.

key.description: Name of a variable. Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

overrideOpenApp.description: ID of a test which will be used for replacing openApp (UUID).

composeJetpack.description: Only for Android Native applications when using Instrumentation library. If Jetpack compose / Accessibility service should be enabled.

disableConsoleLogs.description: If console logs capturing should be disabled.

deviceOrientation.description: Only for mobile platforms. Device orientation to set when launching the application.

shouldWaitForQuiescence.description: Only for Apple TV simulators and iOS/iPadOS devices. If Suitest should wait for application quiescence before it marks the aoplication as opened.

url.description: app url, must start with http:// or https://

shouldWaitForQuiescence.description: wait for app quiscence when app is being opened (Android platform only).

disableConsoleLogs.description: disable caption of console logs from the device.

mapRules.description: Rules which alter behaviour of network requests.

codeOverrides.description: replace strings used in the keys to strings used in the values.

key.description: Variable name. Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

overrideOpenApp.description: test which will be used for replacing openApp (uuid).

errorType.example: The application was not found within the specified organization.

owner.description: Name of the Suitest organization owning the device.

customName.example: TV in the top right corner
customName.description: name configurable by an owner, empty for public lab devices

ipAddress.description: Device IP address (in the local network), empty for public lab devices and for browsers

inactivityTimeout.description: Number of minutes of inactivity after which device will be turned off. `0` means never.

modelId.description: Suitest ID of the device model.

status.description:
Current Suitest status of the device. The list below is split by the categories:

Device is available:
- CONTROLLABLE - device control is operational, so it can be connected to and receive user input commands.
- OFF - device has been turned off by Suitest.
- OFFLINE - device is not connected to Suitest but can be turned on.
- READY - device control and test evaluation functions are ready to be used on this device.

Device is in use / temporarily unavailable:
- API_CONTROLLED - device is controlled by external test runner (JavaScript API or Appium integration).
- CANDYBOX_UPDATE - update of CandyBox is in progress.
- CLEANUP - device is from Public device lab and preparations for another use are in progress.
- INTERACTIVE_MODE - a user is connected to this device in interactive mode.
- MAINTENANCE - Suitest is doing a regular maintenance task (e.g. extending a developer mode session on LG webOS device) or restarting the control unit requested by a user.
- MANUAL_RUN - device is processing test launched with manual user intervention.
- POWER_ON - device is turning on.
- RESTARTING - device is being prepared to launch a test.
- SHUTDOWN - Suitest server is being restarted (usually due to maintenance, happening rarely).
- SUITEST_DRIVE_UPDATE - update of SuitestDrive is in progress.
- TESTING - an automated test is currently running on this device.

Device needs manual action to be available:
- BLASTER_ERROR - infrared blaster is not working (probably disconnected).
- CANDYBOX_OFFLINE - CandyBox connected to the device is unreachable.
- CANNOT_TURN_ON - device is offline and Suitest can not turn it on (e.g. device setup does not support power on). Needs to be manually turned on.
- DISABLED - device is disabled in Suitest. Suitest will not control device until enabled.
- DRIVER_FAILURE - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- DRIVER_INIT_FAILURE - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- INTERNAL_FAILURE - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- NOT_CONFIGURED - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- SUITESTDRIVE_OFFLINE - SuitestDrive connected to the device is unreachable/disabled.
- SUITESTDRIVE_SERVICE_OFFLINE - SuitestDrive on CandyBox is not running. Should be fixed by restarting SuitestDrive through the Web UI.

location.description: Field configurable by the device owner

team.description: Field configurable by the device owner

responsibleUser.description: Field configurable by the device owner

osInfo.description: Field configurable by the device owner

otherInfo.description: Field configurable by the device owner

inUseBy.description: Exists only when device is in use. Only one property is returned in accordance with how it is used.

email.description: Returned when its used by UI or with personal token.

orgName.description: Returned when device is used by a different company.

tokenName.description: Returned when device is used by serviceToken. If it's empty it means that token was deleted.

deviceId.description: Suitest ID of this device, which is visible on the device detail page.

owner.description: Name of the Suitest organization owning the device.

customName.example: TV in the top right corner
customName.description: Name configurable by the device owner, empty for public lab devices.

ipAddress.description: Device IP address (in the local network), empty for public lab devices and for browsers

inactivityTimeout.description: Number of minutes of inactivity after which device will be turned off. `0` means never.

modelId.description: Suitest ID of the device model.

status.description:
Current Suitest status of the device. The list below is split by the categories:

Device is available:
- CONTROLLABLE - device control is operational, so it can be connected to and receive user input commands.
- OFF - device has been turned off by Suitest.
- OFFLINE - device is not connected to Suitest but can be turned on.
- READY - device control and test evaluation functions are ready to be used on this device.

Device is in use / temporarily unavailable:
- API_CONTROLLED - device is controlled by external test runner (JavaScript API or Appium integration).
- CANDYBOX_UPDATE - update of CandyBox is in progress.
- CLEANUP - device is from Public device lab and preparations for another use are in progress.
- INTERACTIVE_MODE - a user is connected to this device in interactive mode.
- MAINTENANCE - Suitest is doing a regular maintenance task (e.g. extending a developer mode session on LG webOS device) or restarting the control unit requested by a user.
- MANUAL_RUN - device is processing test launched with manual user intervention.
- POWER_ON - device is turning on.
- RESTARTING - device is being prepared to launch a test.
- SHUTDOWN - Suitest server is being restarted (usually due to maintenance, happening rarely).
- SUITEST_DRIVE_UPDATE - update of SuitestDrive is in progress.
- TESTING - an automated test is currently running on this device.

Device needs manual action to be available:
- BLASTER_ERROR - infrared blaster is not working (probably disconnected).
- CANDYBOX_OFFLINE - CandyBox connected to the device is unreachable.
- CANNOT_TURN_ON - device is offline and Suitest can not turn it on (e.g. device setup does not support power on). Needs to be manually turned on.
- DISABLED - device is disabled in Suitest. Suitest will not control device until enabled.
- DRIVER_FAILURE - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- DRIVER_INIT_FAILURE - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- INTERNAL_FAILURE - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- NOT_CONFIGURED - error happened. Suitest team should be contacted.
- SUITESTDRIVE_OFFLINE - SuitestDrive connected to the device is unreachable/disabled.
- SUITESTDRIVE_SERVICE_OFFLINE - SuitestDrive on CandyBox is not running. Should be fixed by restarting SuitestDrive through the Web UI.

location.description: Field configurable by the device owner

team.description: Field configurable by the device owner

responsibleUser.description: Field configurable by the device owner

osInfo.description: Field configurable by the device owner

otherInfo.description: Field configurable by the device owner

inUseBy.description: Exists only when device is in use. Only one property is returned in accordance with how it is used.

email.description: Returned when its used by UI or with personal token.

orgName.description: Returned when device is used by a different company.

tokenName.description: Returned when device is used by serviceToken. If it's empty it means that token was deleted.

modelId.description: ID of the model of this device.

firmware.description: Version of the firmware installed on device.

errorType.description:
Possible errors:

  - schemaValidationFailed - Input data does not match defined schema. Please check example and model.

  - invalidAppId - supplied app id was invalid or not found in the organization
  - invalidConfigId - supplied config id was invalid or not found in the organization
  - invalidConfiguration - the configuration is missing important values - fix those in the UI
  - invalidDeviceId - supplied device id was invalid
  - invalidIntegrationId - supplied integration id was invalid
  - invalidParameter - supplied payload parameter is invalid
  - invalidTestId - invalid format of test id
  - invalidVersionId - supplied version id was invalid
  - invalidIncludeChangelist - argument must be boolean

  - invalidOffsetIdType - url parameters are malformed
  - missingOffsetParam - url parameters are malformed

  - resultNotFound - result with specified id was not found

  - testPackNotFound

  - testNotFound

  - webhookAlreadyExists - there is already the similar webhook with the same filter settings

  - invalidSortByValue
  - invalidSortDirectionType

total.description: Total number of existing objects. This is an optional element that is not provided in all responses, as it can be expensive to compute.

page.description: Page number of the current results. This is an optional element that is not provided in all responses.

pagelen.description: Current number of objects on the existing page. Globally, the minimum length is 10 and the maximum is 100. Some APIs may specify a different default. Only available when pages are used.

next.description: Link to the next page if it exists. The last page of a collection does not have this value. Use this link to navigate the result set and refrain from constructing your own URLs.

previous.description: Link to previous page if it exists. A collections first page does not have this value. This is an optional element that is not provided in all responses. Some result sets strictly support forward navigation and never provide previous links. Clients must anticipate that backwards navigation is not always available. Use this link to navigate the result set and refrain from constructing your own URLs.

values.description: The list of objects. This contains at most pagelen objects.

devices.description: List of device ids on which test pack should be executed. If not present, devices specified in the test pack are used.

TestLine.title: TestLine
TestLine.description: Single test line. Format of this object is not completely frozen because new features are added to the Suitest continuously.

val.description: required for some subject types e.g. cookie.

delay.description: Time in milliseconds. 0 means default delay (for some platforms could be 1 second). The effective maximum is controlled by plan.

ids.description: list of buttons for presses, only used for type button

then.description: Specifies behaviour when condition is evaluated as success. Not available for all task types.

name.description: Human readable name of the test pack.

active.description: Flag which allows automatic scheduling of the test pack based on planning field.

configId.description: The ID of the associated app configuration.

devices.description: List of device IDs specified in the configuration of this test pack.

tests.description: Specifies rules by which the test scenarios will be included into this test pack. Suitest will look up the matching test scenarios at the time when the test pack is executed.

byQuery.description: Select test scenarios matched by [Cucumber's tag expression](https://cucumber.io/docs/cucumber/api/#tag-expressions).

planning.description: Current execution schedule of the test pack.

daysOfWeek.description: List of matching days of week starting from 0 (Sunday) to 6 (Saturday).

hours.description: List of matching hours from 0 to 23.

minutes.description: List of matching minutes in 15 min interval.

meta.description: Additional properties of this test pack.

reportFirstErrorForDevice.description: If set to true a notification will be sent out (on all channels) immediately after the first line error occurs in any test that is part of this test pack.

reportSummary.description: If set to true a notification will be sent out (on all channels) after all test scenarios have finished executing on all devices.

email.description: If set to true notifications will be sent to email addresses specified by `emailAddresses`.

slack.description: If set to true notifications will be posted into the Slack channel connected to the Suitest account.

emailAddresses.description: List of email addresses where to send the email notification.

customName.example: My mobile phone sharing Apple TV screen.
customName.description: Name configurable by a video capture device owner.

assignedDeviceId.description: Device id paired with the video capture device.

batteryState.description: Available only for android apps and only if the app is online.

isCharging.description: True if a phone is connected to charger.

timestamp.description: timestamp when the log message was recorded

lineId.description: line id during which execution console error was received

data.description: values recorded by console in order of their presence in command

LineResult.title: LineResult
LineResult.description: Result of single test line. Format of this object is not completely frozen because new features are added to the Suitest continuously.

errorType.description:
Present only if error was detected. Can be present even if the line has result success. Error is reported when actual value is not matching condition but can be reported as success due to settings of `then` value in the test definition.

errorType | Description
--------- | -----------
queryFailed | Found value does not match expected value
invalidInput | Expected value has incorrect format
deviceError | Error detected on the device

request.description: Request data delivered to the destination server. If `error` attribute is present, request was stopped at suitestify and did not reach the destination server.

time.description: Time when request was received by suitestify, or time when request was issued. Depends on platform. Unix timestamp of request in milliseconds, 0 means 1. January 1970 0:00:00 GMT.

additionalProperties.description: if header is repeated, multiple values are placed in the array in order of occurrence

error.description: error which happened during processing request from device by suitestify

returnedStatusCode.description: returned status code to the device, remote server was not contacted

response.description: present only if response were received during test execution

error.description: reason why remote server could not be contacted or error during contacting of remote server

returnedStatusCode.description: returned status code to the device, remote server was not contacted or error happen during processing

time.description: Unix timestamp of failed response in milliseconds, 0 means 1. January 1970 0:00:00 GMT. Present only when remote server could not be contacted

additionalProperties.description: if header is repeated, multiple values are placed in the array in order of occurrence

startTime.description: timestamp when first byte of the response has been received (by suitestify or device itself, depends on platform)

finishTime.description: timestamp when last byte of the request has been received (by suitestify or device itself, depends on platform)

responseSize.description: size of response body in bytes produces by server (result from suitestify may differ)

frozen.description: if true previously stored version of response is used instead of response from the server

devices.description: List of devices on which this test was run or is running or will be run.

result.description: Result of the tests if they were finished. Omitted if not finished.

endTime.description: When this test run finished. Not defined for not finished test.

errorType.example: The test case was not found.
The test case was not found.

tags.description: List of string tags currently set on this test scenario.

name.description: Username of the author of the latest revision.

LatestRevisionTime.description: The timestamp of the latest revision. Corresponds to the scenario last saved time.

errorType.description:
Possible errors:
  - tokenUnauthorized
  - tokenInvalid
  - tokenTypeInvalid
  - tokenPasswordTypeInvalid

error.description:
Possible errors:
  - session not created
  - IP address is not whitelisted
  - tokenUnauthorized
  - tokenInvalid
  - tokenTypeInvalid
  - tokenPasswordTypeInvalid

AppiumCapabilities.description: Only suitest specific capabilities are described here. Please check official documentation for more. https://www.w3.org/TR/webdriver/

type.description:
Event that triggers the webhook

- `firstTestFailed` - is triggered on the first detected failure
- `testPackFinished` - is triggered when all tests of the test pack are finished
- `testPackRecordingUploadFinished` - is triggered when all recorded videos are stored

filter.description:
Filter events that triggers the webhook.

- `all` - is reported for all test packs
- `onlyFailed` - it reports only failed test packs, is effective only for event type `testPackFinished`

appVersionId.description: ID of the app version. Either `appVersionId` or `testPackId` must be provided.

testPackId.description: ID of the test pack. Either `appVersionId` or `testPackId` must be provided.

400.description: Required arguments is missing or some argument is invalid.

403.description: Forbidden access - your IP address is not whitelisted. Please contact your Suitest administrator for more information.

versionId.name: versionId
versionId.description: ID of the app version. Can be found on **Details** tab of the specific version.

includeChangelist.name: includeChangelist
includeChangelist.description: Controls if changes from changelist should be included to the result

resultId.name: resultId
resultId.description: Refers to an execution result of a single test on a single device. `resultId` can be obtained from the feed `GET /test-pack-runs/{testPackRunId}?detailed=true` - *Get results for test pack execution*

testPackId.name: testPackId
testPackId.description: ID of the Test Pack. Can be found on **CI & JavaScript API** tab for the specific test pack.

testPackRunId.name: testPackRunId
testPackRunId.description:
ID of the test execution round associated with a test pack. Returned from
  * `POST /test-packs/{testPackId}` - start execution of a Test Pack
  * `GET /test-packs/{testPackId}/results/finished` - get list of finished test pack executions
  * `GET /test-packs/{testPackId}/round/{round}`

offsetId.name: offsetId
offsetId.description:
ID of an object after which to place the cursor (cursor-based pagination).
If a request returned 10 objects and you would like to get the next 10, set the `offsetId` to the id of the last object from the previous request.

limit.name: limit
limit.description:
Limit the result set to the specified number of items.
If omitted 10 results will be returned. 10 is minimum allowed value, 100 is maximum allowed value.

BasicAuth.description:
For usage of API use HTTP basic authentication, use *Token ID* as user name (user-id) and *Token password* as password.
For trying out our API here insert your *Token ID* into the field *username* and *Token password* into the field *password*.
You can generate the token ID and token password in your [Suitest account](https://the.suite.st/profile/api).
